title: Canary ui_rebrand mission 001
objective: Refresh the UI with India-first typography, labels, and iconography.
acceptance_criteria: Core screens render the new theme with no visual regressions in smoke checks.
rollback_scope: Revert theme tokens and restore the previous asset bundle.

title: Canary categories mission 002
objective: Add spending categories aligned to Indian household and SME workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Users can select new categories and legacy mappings remain intact.
rollback_scope: Restore the previous category seed and mapping table.

title: Canary gst mission 003
objective: Implement GST-aware tax fields and rate handling for expense entries.
acceptance_criteria: GST amount and effective rate calculate correctly for standard invoice cases.
rollback_scope: Disable GST computation and revert tax parser changes.

title: Canary inr_upi mission 004
objective: Enable INR defaults, lakh-crore formatting, and UPI payment metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Amounts display in INR format and UPI transactions save required fields.
rollback_scope: Switch locale configuration back and hide UPI-specific fields.

title: Canary sample_data mission 005
objective: Generate India-centric sample transactions across cash, card, and UPI.
acceptance_criteria: Seed jobs load deterministic sample data without duplicate rows.
rollback_scope: Remove new sample rows and reload the previous global dataset.

title: Canary dashboard mission 006
objective: Update dashboard widgets to highlight India rollout KPIs and totals.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard cards and charts show correct totals for seeded scenarios.
rollback_scope: Re-enable legacy dashboard widget configuration.

title: Canary monthly_summary mission 007
objective: Revise monthly summary sections for Indian tax and spending patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Monthly summaries render new sections and totals match ledger data.
rollback_scope: Fallback to the legacy summary template and section order.

title: Canary ai_insights mission 008
objective: Tune AI insight prompts for Indian spending behavior and compliance cues.
acceptance_criteria: Generated insights reflect localized trends without policy violations.
rollback_scope: Point the insights service back to the previous prompt version.

title: Canary backend_api mission 009
objective: Extend API contracts to expose India rollout fields and filters.
acceptance_criteria: Updated endpoints pass contract tests and stay backward compatible.
rollback_scope: Redeploy the previous API version and disable new fields.

title: Canary schema_migration mission 010
objective: Apply schema changes for localization, GST, and UPI attributes.
acceptance_criteria: Migration runs forward and backward cleanly in staging.
rollback_scope: Run down migrations and restore the pre-rollout schema snapshot.

title: Canary tests mission 011
objective: Add automated coverage for localization, tax, and payment flows.
acceptance_criteria: Target suites pass with no increase in flaky failures.
rollback_scope: Remove new test gates and restore the prior CI matrix.

title: Canary docs mission 012
objective: Document rollout behavior, runbooks, and user-facing changes.
acceptance_criteria: Documentation publishes successfully with setup, usage, and limits.
rollback_scope: Revert docs to the last stable version and republish.

objective: Harden rollout controls, monitoring, and kill-switch procedures.
acceptance_criteria: Rollback drills validate alarms, hooks, and SLO dashboards.
rollback_scope: Activate release freeze and execute the standard rollback runbook.

rollback_scope: Disable GST computation and revert tax parser changes.
